title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 521.100 - Suit dismissed for failure to give new bond
text:
521.100.  Suit dismissed for failure to give new bond. — If the plaintiff shall fail to comply with such order within ten days after the same shall be made, the suit shall be dismissed at his costs.
(RSMo 1939 § 1447) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1283; 1919 § 1734; 1909 § 2303
